description: MCP server wrapping Claude Code CLI for query, review, search, structured output, sessions.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.hampsterx/claude-mcp-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Path to the claude CLI binary. Defaults to 'claude' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_CLI_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Shared default model for all tools. Overridden by per-tool CLAUDE_<TOOL>_MODEL vars (QUERY, REVIEW, SEARCH, STRUCTURED).
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_DEFAULT_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override model for the query tool.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_QUERY_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override model for the structured tool.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_STRUCTURED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override model for the search tool.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_SEARCH_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Override model for the review tool.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_REVIEW_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Model to use when the primary model hits a quota error. Set to 'none' to disable fallback.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_FALLBACK_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to forward ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to the CLI. Default is subscription-first: the CLI uses existing Max/Pro session and API key is NOT forwarded. Opt in only if you want API billing.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_BRIDGE_USE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Maximum USD spend per call (pass-through to --max-budget-usd). Only applies when using API key auth.
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_MAX_BUDGET_USD

environmentVariables.description: Reasoning effort for the query tool (low|medium|high|max).
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_QUERY_EFFORT

environmentVariables.description: Reasoning effort for the review tool (low|medium|high|max).
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_REVIEW_EFFORT

environmentVariables.description: Reasoning effort for the search tool (low|medium|high|max).
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_SEARCH_EFFORT
